positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a majestic howling wolf framed by bioluminescent celestial elements. The wolf is depicted in a powerful, dynamic pose against a deep twilight sky, emphasizing a dramatic silhouette. Swirling cosmic dust, abstract constellations, and glowing nebula patterns surround the wolf's head and tail. The style should be modern, highly intricate line art combined with vibrant, ethereal gradients. Strong contrast between the dark foreground silhouette and the luminous background. Composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print. High detail, symmetrical balance, clean vector aesthetics. Colors: deep indigo, sapphire blue, midnight purple, accented with electric cyan and neon teal. Suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, busy background, excessive detail, blurry, lowres, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, artifacts, grainy
